summary: Remove --artist and --playlist flags from `queue from-saved` until the saved_tracks schema is joined against a tracks-cache table.
reason: Both flags were registered and shown in --help but never referenced in the SQL query. The 'not yet implemented' annotation in flag help text prevented complete surprise but still misled agents/scripts. Removing entirely is honest; the flags can come back when sync wires up a tracks-cache table with artist/playlist linkage.
